milestones.title: NISPOM Ch. 2 Annual Review
milestones.notes: All 7 sites reviewed. 0 findings. Lincolnia HQ and DC Metro received commendations from DSS for documentation quality.

milestones.title: DC Metro DAAPM Audit
milestones.notes: Full DAAPM audit completed by Booz Allen Hamilton. 0 open findings. 97% compliance score.

milestones.title: Colorado Springs TEMPEST Re-Survey
milestones.notes: All 5 SCIF zones re-surveyed. Zone 3 minor finding corrected same day.

milestones.title: CA Lab DAAPM Audit
milestones.notes: 1 minor cable separation finding identified and closed same day. Commendation issued to SSM S. Kim.

milestones.title: Seattle Annex ICD 705 Review
milestones.notes: 2 zones reviewed. All technical specs within tolerance. Door hardware noted as approaching end-of-life.

milestones.title: ICD 705 Zone Mapping — Lincolnia HQ
milestones.notes: All 6 zones certified. Zones 5 and 6 newly accredited. Full ICD 705 technical compliance achieved.

milestones.title: NISPOM Self-Inspection — Colorado Springs
milestones.notes: Annual self-inspection completed. 1 minor finding (access roster lag) identified. Corrective action completed same week.

milestones.title: DC Metro TSCM Sweep
milestones.notes: 8-zone TSCM sweep by ManTech. Unauthorized Bluetooth device found in Conference Room 4B. Device traced — no hostile capability confirmed. Re-sweep Apr 2 — clean.

milestones.title: TEMPEST Recertification — Lincolnia HQ
milestones.notes: Server Room B shielding gap blocking completion. Emergency vendor on site. Shielding installation begins Apr 11.

milestones.title: TX Field eLog Deployment
milestones.notes: Hardware delivered. IT configuration in progress. Training scheduled Apr 22 with A. Reeves leading.

milestones.title: ICD 705 Reaccreditation — Lincolnia HQ
milestones.notes: Checklist 85% complete. Sections 4 and 5 pending TEMPEST recert sign-off. Leidos support team engaged.

milestones.title: MD Warehouse Q2 Compliance Audit
milestones.notes: Audit initiated Apr 8. Documentation phase underway. 2 training gaps must be closed before physical inspection phase.

milestones.title: Seattle Annex Door Hardware Replacement
milestones.notes: Replacement EM lock hardware ordered. Certified locksmith installation scheduled Apr 15.

milestones.title: TX Field SCIF Expansion — Phase 1
milestones.notes: Design complete. $230K budget authorization pending CFO sign-off. Construction contractor pre-qualified.

milestones.title: Colorado Springs Accreditation Renewal
milestones.notes: Accreditation expires Oct 31. Renewal package preparation begins in July.

milestones.title: MD Warehouse Accreditation Renewal
milestones.notes: Accreditation expires Jul 31. TEMPEST EMI mitigation (legacy lighting) must be resolved prior to renewal inspection.

milestones.title: NISPOM Chapter 8 Review — All Sites
milestones.notes: Annual review of automated information systems compliance. Encompasses all 7 sites — ISSM coordination required.

milestones.title: Annual Personnel Security Training
milestones.notes: Mandatory annual security awareness training for all 214 cleared personnel. Hybrid delivery: CBT + in-person for SAP-cleared staff.

milestones.title: DC Metro SAP Facility Expansion — SCIF 7 & 8
milestones.notes: SCIF 7 and 8 construction authorized. ICD 705 accreditation application to be filed 60 days before completion.

milestones.title: FY27 Budget Submission to OUSD(I&S)
milestones.notes: Annual Program Objective Memorandum (POM) submission. Includes FY27 capital requests for TX Field expansion and MD Warehouse TEMPEST upgrades.
